note: Compound v2 cETH max-repay helper. Both fns repay a borrower's entire cETH debt via msg.value and refund the excess.

0x9f35c3d5.name: repayBehalf
0x9f35c3d5.reason: user fund move: repay all of a borrower's cETH debt (payable, refunds excess) (Lending::Repay on-behalf)

0x367b7f05.name: repayBehalfExplicit
0x367b7f05.reason: user fund move: same with explicit cEther market arg (Lending::Repay on-behalf)
